name: Scheduled Tasks (Cron)
description: Run background tasks on a schedule (interval or cron expression with timezone), billed to the app owner
details: Add cron.json (task declarations) and src/cron.ts (handler). Each task uses EITHER intervalMinutes ("every N minutes from deploy") OR schedule+timezone ("5-field cron expression in a specific timezone"). The platform triggers the handler at the right time. The handler receives a CronContext with records access and optional integration access billed to owner. Use for: daily content generation, periodic cleanup, data aggregation, scheduled notifications.
instructions: Edit cron.json: define tasks with EITHER { name, intervalMinutes } OR { name, schedule, timezone }
Each task must use one mode — intervalMinutes for simple intervals, schedule+timezone for time-of-day/cron expressions
schedule is a standard 5-field cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week
timezone is an IANA timezone string like "America/New_York" or "UTC"
Edit src/cron.ts: implement handler(taskName, ctx) function
Use ctx.integrations.call(endpoint, params) for API calls (optional, billed to owner)
The platform handles scheduling, auth, and billing — no wiring needed
patterns: export async function handler(taskName: string, ctx: CronContext) { ... }
